particulars.description: By way of first legal mortgage, all estates or interests in any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property now owned by it; all present and future estates or interests of the company in, or over, any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property; all its present and future goodwill; all its uncalled capital; all its intellectual property.

persons_entitled.name: Barry Devlin, Ruth Devlin and Alan Harman (Together the Security Trustees)
